parameters.apprise_url_plus: matrix://${ customer_secrets.{{ params.user_secret }} }:${ customer_secrets.{{ params.password_secret }} }@${ customer_secrets.{{ params.host_secret }} }/#${ customer_secrets.{{ params.targets_secret }} }
parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Matrix destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise matrix:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead compose the Matrix client API URL from your stored secrets and POST a native m.room.message payload directly, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_body_template: {"msgtype":"m.text","body":{* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and "\n" or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}}
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Matrix homeserver (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Matrix destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_url_plus: ${ customer_secrets.MATRIX_BASE ?? https://matrix.org }/_matrix/client/v3/rooms/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.room_secret }} }/send/m.room.message/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.txn_secret }} }

host_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Matrix host

password_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Matrix password

room_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Matrix room ID (URL-encoded); used by the gateway-plus transformer channel

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Matrix targets

txn_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Matrix transaction ID; used by the gateway-plus transformer channel

user_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Matrix user
